author: maxine--basel
content: User answered all 5 design questions. Key decisions: (1) External reads use hub branch JSON directly, no SQLite sync needed. (2) --source may collide, need to check and possibly use --repo or --remote. (3) Named aliases need deeper design. (4) All three display boundary approaches (prefix, banner, JSON field). (5) MCP in scope, REST API out of scope.
